default_reference_range_notes:
< 100: Optimal
100 to 129: Near / Above Optimal
130 to 159: Borderline High
160 to 189: High
>= 190: Very High

0.5 to 3.0: Desirable or Low Risk
3.0 to 6.0: Line or Elevated Risk
> 6.0: High Risk

For Cardiac Risk: 
<0.1 Low risk
0.1 to 0.3 Average Risk
0.31 to 1.0 High Risk
